description: Offline versioned CMS Medicare Coverage fixture set for SGLT2 inhibitors / diabetes / CKD. These are illustrative coverage documents based on CMS LCD/NCD structure. NOT real-time API responses.
query_context: SGLT2 inhibitors; diabetes mellitus type 2; chronic kidney disease; antidiabetic agents
notes: LCD/NCD IDs in these fixtures are illustrative. Verify against the live CMS Coverage API before clinical use.
Coverage determinations reflect the document structure; they are not patient-specific advice.
